recordHighlights.name: Playoff Losses
recordHighlights.label: Losses
recordHighlights.description: This record recognizes the team with the most playoff defeats in league history. It reflects tough postseason runs and near-misses, showcasing resilience in the face of high-stakes matchups and the drive to bounce back after setbacks.

recordHighlights.name: Opponent Playoff Points
recordHighlights.label: Points
recordHighlights.description: This record recognizes the team that has had the most points scored against them in playoff games. It highlights challenging postseason matchups, where opponents consistently put up strong point totals, showcasing the team’s resilience in the face of high-scoring competition.

recordHighlights.name: Playoff Points
recordHighlights.label: Points
recordHighlights.description: This record celebrates the team with the most total points scored in playoff games in league history. It reflects offensive firepower and the ability to perform at a high level when the stakes are highest, consistently putting up big numbers in the postseason.

recordHighlights.name: Playoff Wins
recordHighlights.label: Wins
recordHighlights.description: This record honors the team with the most playoff victories in league history. It highlights sustained success in high-pressure matchups, showcasing the team’s ability to perform when it matters most and secure crucial wins in the postseason.

recordHighlights.name: Highest Playoff Combined Matchup Score
recordHighlights.label: Total Points
recordHighlights.description: This record honors the matchup with the highest total points scored by both teams combined in a single playoff game. It reflects an exciting and high-scoring postseason battle, where both teams showcased offensive firepower, resulting in a thrilling contest with an impressive combined score.

recordHighlights.name: Highest Playoff Combined Matchup Score
recordHighlights.label: Total Points
recordHighlights.description: This record honors the matchup with the highest total points scored by both teams combined in a single playoff game. It reflects an exciting and high-scoring postseason battle, where both teams showcased offensive firepower, resulting in a thrilling contest with an impressive combined score.

recordHighlights.name: Most Playoff Matchup Points
recordHighlights.label: Points
recordHighlights.description: This record celebrates the team with the highest points scored in a single playoff matchup. It reflects a standout performance in the postseason, showcasing offensive firepower and the ability to shine when the stakes are at their highest.

recordHighlights.name: Blowout Losses
recordHighlights.label: Losses
recordHighlights.description: This record recognizes the team with the most lopsided defeats, where they were beaten by a significant margin. It reflects tough seasons where the competition was simply too strong, marking games of significant underperformance.

recordHighlights.name: Playoff Losses
recordHighlights.label: Losses
recordHighlights.description: This record recognizes the team with the most playoff defeats in league history. It reflects tough postseason runs and near-misses, showcasing resilience in the face of high-stakes matchups and the drive to bounce back after setbacks.

recordHighlights.name: Biggest Playoff Matchup Blowout
recordHighlights.label: Points
recordHighlights.description: This record celebrates the playoff matchup with the largest margin of victory. It reflects a dominant postseason performance, where one team decisively outplayed the other, leaving no doubt as to who was the superior team in that high-stakes game.

recordHighlights.name: Top Half Scores (%)
recordHighlights.label: Top Half Scores %
recordHighlights.description: This record honors the team with the highest percentage of weeks finishing in the top half of league scoring, demonstrating reliable production above the league average.

recordHighlights.name: Narrowest Wins
recordHighlights.label: Wins
recordHighlights.description: This record celebrates the team with the most victories decided by razor-thin margins, highlighting their knack for winning close games.

recordHighlights.name: Coach Score - Num Perfect Games
recordHighlights.label: Matchups
recordHighlights.description: This record tracks the number of perfect coaching scores achieved.

recordHighlights.name: Most Interceptions - Matchup
recordHighlights.label: Interceptions
recordHighlights.description: This record tracks the most interceptions committed by a team in a single matchup.

recordHighlights.name: cMost Interceptions - Player in a Matchup
recordHighlights.label: Interceptions
recordHighlights.description: This record highlights the player who committed the most interceptions in one matchup for a team.

recordHighlights.name: Most Passing Yards - All-Time
recordHighlights.label: Yards
recordHighlights.description: This record applauds the member with the highest cumulative passing yards.

recordHighlights.name: Top Player - Matchup
recordHighlights.label: Points
recordHighlights.description: This record showcases the highest single-game point total from any roster player.

recordHighlights.name: Top RB Player - Matchup
recordHighlights.label: Points
recordHighlights.description: This record recognizes the running back who scored the most points in a single matchup.

recordHighlights.name: Most Defensive Touchdowns - Matchup
recordHighlights.label: Touchdowns
recordHighlights.description: This record tracks the most defensive touchdowns by a team in a single matchup.

recordHighlights.name: Most Defensive Touchdowns - Player in a Matchup
recordHighlights.label: Touchdowns

recordHighlights.label: Points

recordHighlights.label: Touchdowns

recordHighlights.name: Most Fumbles - Player in a Matchup
